feed.title: In Search Of The Holy Posterior - random

entry.title: History of GANs
entry.summary: One day I was asked to tell about what's going on in GANs. I said "ohh, ok". Here is my view so far.
entry.content:
One day I was asked to tell about what's going on in GANs. I said "ohh, ok". Here is my view so far.

GANs are everywhere

If you only look here (warning, this might frighten you),
